recommendations.title: Mercury Rising
recommendations.overview: Renegade FBI agent Art Jeffries protects a nine-year-old autistic boy who has cracked the government's new "unbreakable" code.

recommendations.title: Taps
recommendations.overview: Military cadets take extreme measures to ensure the future of their academy when its existence is threatened by local condo developers.

recommendations.title: City Hall
recommendations.overview: The accidental shooting of a boy in New York City leads to an investigation by the Deputy Mayor, and unexpectedly far-reaching consequences.

recommendations.title: Malice
recommendations.overview: A tale about a happily married couple who would like to have children. Tracy teaches infants, Andy's a college professor. Things are never the same after she is taken to hospital and operated upon by Jed, a "know all" doctor.

recommendations.title: Sea of Love

recommendations.title: Vision Quest
recommendations.overview: After deciding he needs to do something meaningful with his life, high school wrestler Louden Swain sets out on a mission to drop weight and challenge the area's undefeated champion, which creates problems with his teammates and health. Matters are c

recommendations.title: Domestic Disturbance
recommendations.overview: Frank Morrison is a divorced father with a 12-year-old son, Danny. His ex-wife Susan and son Danny now live with Rick Barnes, Susan's new husband. Danny, who has a reputation for telling lies, accuses his stepfather of committing a murder. Initially,

recommendations.title: The Trial
recommendations.overview: Arrested for an unnamed crime, Josef K. is trapped in a surreal bureaucratic maze where justice is unknowable and guilt is assumed.

recommendations.title: The Guilty

recommendations.title: Small World
